caption: A photo of a yellow dog in front of the mirror. The dog stands close to the mirror in soft indoor light, and its reflection appears clearly on the glass within a simple frame. The background is gently out of focus, drawing attention to the dog and the mirrored image.

segments_info.text: The mirror frame surrounding the reflective surface.
The shape of dog standing in front of the mirror. The shape is not absolutely correct, make it more realistic
The dog's reflection visible inside the mirror.
